figures.caption: Fig. 1: Convergent (first) and divergent (second) circuit couplings. The circuits and toy values for the parameters (R = 1Ω, L1 = 5H, L2 = 2H, C = 1F) are based on examples of [9].
Fig. 2: Evolution of voltage across generalized capacitance of monolithic vmono and co-simulated vkf , k = 1, . . . , 8 solutions for convergent (left) and divergent (right) circuits in Figure 1.
